summary: Verified Global Info Bin / Lookup Reuse Cache functionality. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Inspector Panel displays global_cache_count, global_cache_tokens, global_bin_status, and rehydration_order correctly without crashing.
test_credentials: No credentials required - using michael@example.com as default user context
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Global Bin Seed' session created by main agent for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Info Bin functionality fully verified. Backend receipt now includes: selected_global_cache_ids (list), global_cache_count (int), global_cache_tokens (int), global_bin_status ('empty'|'reused'), rehydration_order ending with global_bin_reused or global_bin_empty. GET /api/caos/memory/global-bin endpoint returns GlobalInfoBinResponse with entries. Frontend Inspector Panel displays all these fields correctly.

global_info_bin_endpoint.GET /api/caos/memory/global-bin: Returns 200 with user_email and entries list
global_info_bin_endpoint.entry_structure: id, user_email, lane, subject_bins, retrieval_terms, snippet, source_session_id, source_message_id, hits, created_at, updated_at
global_info_bin_endpoint.lane_filter: Supports optional lane query parameter for filtering

receipt_global_cache_fields.selected_global_cache_ids: List of global cache entry IDs used in the turn
receipt_global_cache_fields.global_cache_count: Integer count of global cache entries used
receipt_global_cache_fields.global_cache_tokens: Integer token count for global cache content (e.g., 69)

cache_reuse_behavior.first_turn: Generates reusable assistant reply, populates global bin
cache_reuse_behavior.second_turn: Reuses cached global info, receipt shows global_bin_status='reused'
cache_reuse_behavior.cache_ids_validation: selected_global_cache_ids reference valid entries in global-bin

frontend_inspector_panel.rehydration_order_display: Shows full order ending with global_bin_reused (data-testid='caos-inspector-rehydration-order')
frontend_inspector_panel.no_crashes: Panel renders without errors for all receipt data

frontend: Inspector panel opens via Tools button
Global cache count element displays correctly (value: 1)
Global cache tokens element displays correctly (value: 69)
Global bin status element displays correctly (value: reused)
Rehydration order element displays correctly (ends with global_bin_reused)
Retention explanation shows reused memories and continuity anchors
